summary: Hillel Wayne announces a temporary pause in blog writing to focus on completing his book 'Logic for Programmers'. He expects to resume blogging in early 2025. He notes that his weekly newsletter will continue during this hiatus.
key_points: Blog is on hiatus while the author focuses on writing 'Logic for Programmers'
money_quotes: All of my budgeted blogwriting time is going to Logic for Programmers.
key_insight: Sometimes you have to pause one project to focus on completing another.
